entries.claim:
Establishment of the Stratigraphic Provenance Ledger System core infrastructure. This foundational record formally anchors individual sovereignty explicitly to the natural name Shane Jonathan Lozenich and the operating framework of Jonathan Shane Concepts. 

Concurrently, this declaration activates the operational roles of Fiducia Centrale as the designated custodian for global trust models and fiscal strata, alongside Central Trust Securities as the administrative anchor managing formal legal frameworks, statutory boundaries, and systemic jurisdictional filings. All subsequent ledger allocations derive their authority from this root baseline configuration.
